name: agent-usage-monitor
description: Status-bar consumption indicator + usage analytics dashboard for GitHub Copilot and Claude Code, built on the tok.py / otelmeter.py scripts.

usageMonitor.statusBar.alignment.markdownDescription: Which side of the status bar to anchor the indicator. Changing this recreates the item.

usageMonitor.statusBar.priority.markdownDescription: Status-bar sort priority. Higher numbers sit further toward the chosen edge.

usageMonitor.statusBar.metric.markdownDescription: What the indicator shows. Live OTel leads with **tokens** (authoritative); the imported-CSV fallback leads with **$** (authoritative).

usageMonitor.statusBar.scope.markdownDescription: `global`: every window shows the same total across all captured sessions. `newestSession`: show the most-recently-active session only (approximate 'current window').

usageMonitor.refreshIntervalSeconds.markdownDescription: How often (seconds) to re-read usage data for the status bar.

usageMonitor.pythonPath.markdownDescription: Python interpreter for the optional live-OTel sidecar. Empty = auto-detect (ms-python.python, then `py -3`/`python` on PATH).

usageMonitor.claudeConfigDir.markdownDescription: Override the Claude config dir (default: `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR` or `~/.claude`).

usageMonitor.otel.endpointPort.markdownDescription: Port the OTel sidecar binds and Copilot exports to (`http://localhost:<port>`).

usageMonitor.otel.captureContent.markdownDescription: Capture Copilot prompt/response **content** from OTel spans (`gen_ai.input.messages`). Requires `github.copilot.chat.otel.captureContent`. **Privacy: this records your prompts and code locally.**

usageMonitor.ghPath.markdownDescription: Path to the GitHub CLI (`gh`) for the aggregate usage tile. Empty = `gh` on PATH.

usageMonitor.githubOrg.markdownDescription: Org login for the aggregate usage tile (uses the org billing endpoint). Empty = your user account.

usageMonitor.otel.copilotFile.markdownDescription: Path to Copilot's OTel **file-exporter** output to parse directly (file mode). Empty = auto-detect from `github.copilot.chat.otel.outfile` when `exporterType` is `file`.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:parity && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:otel
